title: heteropogon ritchiei
intro: Heteropogon ritchiei, also known as black grass or kawakawa, is a species of grass that is native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heteropogon ritchiei include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Heteropogon ritchiei can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
